label: Faction interaction comp
description: Schedules faction interaction incidents (trade caravans, visitors, allied assistance) at a yearly rate.

Class.label: Properties class
Class.description: C# StorytellerCompProperties type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

minDaysPassed.label: Min days passed
minDaysPassed.description: Earliest in-game day on which this comp can fire.

allowedTargetTags.label: Allowed target tags
allowedTargetTags.description: Restrict this comp to firing at incident targets with one of these tags.

disallowedTargetTags.label: Disallowed target tags
disallowedTargetTags.description: Exclude incident targets with any of these tags.

minIncChancePopulationIntentFactor.label: Min inc chance population intent factor
minIncChancePopulationIntentFactor.description: Minimum population-intent multiplier applied to incident chance.

enableIfAnyModActive.label: Enable if any mod active
enableIfAnyModActive.description: This comp is active only when at least one mod in this list is loaded.

disableIfAnyModActive.label: Disable if any mod active
disableIfAnyModActive.description: This comp is disabled when any mod in this list is loaded.

incident.label: Incident
incident.description: IncidentDef to fire for this faction interaction.

baseIncidentsPerYear.label: Base incidents per year
baseIncidentsPerYear.description: Average number of times per in-game year this incident fires.

minSpacingDays.label: Min spacing days
minSpacingDays.description: Minimum in-game days between firings of this comp.

minDanger.label: Min danger
minDanger.description: Minimum colony danger level required for this comp to fire.

fullAlliesOnly.label: Full allies only
fullAlliesOnly.description: If true, only factions with full ally status are eligible.

minWealth.label: Min wealth
minWealth.description: Minimum colony wealth required for this comp to fire.
